result.stderr:
Usage:

    guid [option]

Where [option] is an optional single character that controls formatting:

    N    CEB6AD6619EA4A6DA161FA20F63C80F4
    D    CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4
    B    {CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4}
    P    (CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4)

When unspecified, D formatting is used. Use lowercase [option] for lowercase output.

commands.payload:
Usage:

    guid [option]

Where [option] is an optional single character that controls formatting:

    D    CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4
    B    {CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4}
    P    (CEB6AD66-19EA-4A6D-A161-FA20F63C80F4)

When unspecified, D formatting is used. Use lowercase [option] for lowercase output.
